insights.message: Low capital efficiency — ROE 2.8% (<10%) in FY2025
Thin profit margins — NPM 1.9% in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 11.32x in FY2025
Strong Free Cash Flow generation — 18.3% margin in FY2025
